features.evidence: It is a very large laptop with full size keyboard, amazing lights and fast Typing with Cherry keys is truly an enjoyable experience

In my case, I use it for geology and mining applications, specifically for geological modeling software and running heavy calculations, and it performs very well Pros:- FAST like good googly moogly this machine is fast
Works well and if you don't have a problem with fan noise (I use headphones), running it at max settings is awesome Be careful, it gets very hot, burns and makes a lot of noise
- Lots of storage- Features are good One issue though I work with Local LLMs and the 5090 even with 24gb vram
I was concerned about the touchpad but no issues
If aesthetics are not your main priority and you value performance and productivity above all, this laptop is an excellent choice for demanding tasks
If aesthetics are not your main priority and you value performance and productivity above all, this laptop is an excellent choice for demanding tasks
This thing is a BEAST! Incredibly fast, very solid construction, and coming from an OLED display to this mini LED, I found it to be significantly brighter and more vibrant than the OLED screen
Of course the only downside is I get maybe 60-90 run time on the battery but for me that's not a problem as I'm always plugged in
